# CareGoals

> Free advance directive in 20 minutes. One conversation with Reed AI, physician-reviewed, complete directive. Then share it with your family on ComfortCard.

## What we do
CareGoals guides families through advance care planning conversations. AI asks five questions (inspired by Five Wishes), generates a state-specific advance directive, and a physician reviews it. Free to the user — billable to Medicare as ACP (99497/99498).

## The problem
- 63% of Americans have no advance directive
- 57% of families report conflict at end of life
- Attorney preparation costs $300-$1,000
- Less than 3% of Medicare patients have a billed ACP conversation

## Products
- **Reed conversation**: Voice or text AI-guided advance care planning
- **Advance directive**: Generated from your conversation, physician-reviewed
- **ComfortCard family pack**: Digital care identity for every family member
- **Values mapping**: Structured capture of what matters most

## Pricing
- Free: Your advance directive (Medicare covers ACP billing)
- $59/mo: Family membership with ComfortCard pack (via co-op.care)

## Links
- Website: https://caregoals.com
- co-op.care: https://co-op.care
- ComfortCard: https://comfortcard.org
- SolvingHealth: https://solvinghealth.com
